## Meeting Purpose

[Deep-dive partnership discussion between GrowthX and Ceros, focusing on content strategy and AI-driven solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ceros is considering GrowthX's 8-week strategy sprint to enhance content quality, volume, and AI search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a blend of strategic planning, AI-powered content creation, and technical SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Ceros faces challenges with its current CMS and seeks to align content strategy with its visual brand identity](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [The upcoming Ceros Flex product launch presents an opportunity for a holistic content-driven strategy](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Approach

  - [Focus on turning companies into publishers at scale with high-quality, credible content](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Emphasis on audience-first strategy, mapping topics to personas and business goals](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Capability to create various content types, including interactive elements and programmatic content generation](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Use of AI workflows for content creation, refreshing, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Ceros' Content Challenges and Goals

  - [Current blog content misaligned with ideal customer profiles (ICPs) and brand identity](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Need for more thought leadership and visually appealing content](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Desire to leverage Ceros' interactive capabilities in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Upcoming Ceros Flex product launch requiring comprehensive content support](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

### Technical SEO and CMS Considerations

  - [Ceros using Contember CMS, facing performance issues affecting SEO](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)
  - [GrowthX can assist with technical SEO improvements, including sitemap updates and page optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
  - [Potential move to Contentful CMS in the future to address performance concerns](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

### AI Search Optimization (AEO)

  - [GrowthX focuses on content attributes beneficial for both humans and AI systems](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)
  - [Key factors: well-researched, comprehensive, up-to-date content with authority signals](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2910.0)
  - [Differences observed between ChatGPT (quicker indexing) and Perplexity (slower updates)](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2968.0)

### GrowthX's Workflow Demo

  - [Showcased content refreshing workflow using AI-powered analysis and generation](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2601.0)
  - [Ability to add cross-linking, update research, and generate FAQs automatically](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2658.0)
  - [Customizable workflow adaptable to client needs and brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2761.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ceros team to review meeting recording and discuss internally](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2457.0)
  - [Assess GrowthX's offering against current needs and upcoming product launch](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2446.0)
  - [Consider timeline for potential engagement, noting GrowthX's 4-6 week lead time](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)
  - [Explore possibility of one-on-one follow-ups for additional questions with Tyler](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=3086.0)
  - [Make decision on moving forward with GrowthX's 8-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/y9sXPXxQyNgZ8gk5TYWGScCyoDxiz_Ab?tab=summary&timestamp=2446.0)
